## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Related issues

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / feature
- [ ] Docs / website
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds (and `npm run build:driver` if Swift changed)
- [ ] Changes stay generic — no hardcoded app-specific logic in `src/`
- [ ] Updated README / website / docs if behavior or tools changed
- [ ] Tested against a simulator (note device & runtime below)

## Testing

How did you verify this? Include device/runtime and the prompts or tool calls you ran.
